title: Pocket Dimensions
description: This project introduces a fascinating item to the game. It's similar to a bundle, but with a ROOM inside. You can build whatever you want inside and take it with you!
body: # Pocket Dimensions This project introduces a fascinating item to the game. It's similar to a bundle, but with a room inside. You can build whatever you want inside and take it with you! ## How to use it ![Item Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e3ae33eb9427c0d3a17d5a678f16d941fc87b4b.png) After creating the item, right-click to activate and enter it. There is only one room per player. So, if you craft another one, it will take you to the same room. You can identify the room by the player name in the description. Any player with that item can join the room that the item is bound to. Once you have activated your room, you can place it in the Overworld. Don't worry — if someone tries to destroy it while you're inside, you'll feel it. However, other players can also enter it as long as it is placed. If it gets destroyed, everyone inside will leave the pocket instantly. ## Installation Please make sure to install the resource pack as well when using the datapack. It is mandatory to see any textures. When using the mod, it's not necessary. If you are installing the datapack on a server, you can also install it as an server side pack. ## Help In case you encounter some problems, have some questions, or just want to learn more about the pack, feel free to read the [Documentation](https://github.com/MavLeague/pocket_dimension/blob/main/SUPPORT.md). If you still have questions, feel free to open an [Issue](https://github.com/MavLeague/pocket_dimension/issues) and help me to improve my pack! ## Expansions If you would like to use alternative textures with this pack, you can install [![New Pocket Dimension](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fapi.modrinth.com%2Fv2%2Fproject%2Ficpz8Bnp&query=title&style=flat-square&logo=modrinth&label=%20&color=gray)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-pocket-dimension) to enhance your experience even further! ## Customization ![Example Room](https://github.com/MavLeague/pocket_dimension/blob/main/media/example_room.gif?raw=true) You can create whatever you can imagine! Start now and build your own pocket dimension! #
